predicate_mappings.routing_assigned: routing is assigned to the netting batch {}

predicate_mappings.secondary_window_confirmed: {} is a secondary window confirmed for {}

preconditions: I can only initialize a netting batch A if it is not the case that the batch A is initialized and it is not the case that A is released
effects: Once I initialize a netting batch A, it is the case that the batch A is initialized

attach_instruction_to_batch.description: attach a payment instruction B to a netting batch A
preconditions: I can only attach a payment instruction B to a netting batch A if it is the case that the batch A is initialized and instruction is available for B and B is eligible for netting batch A
I can only attach a payment instruction B to a netting batch A if it is not the case that the netting batch A has instructions
effects: Once I attach a payment instruction B to a netting batch A, it is the case that the payment instruction B is attached to the netting batch A and the netting batch A has instructions
Once I attach a payment instruction B to a netting batch A, it is not the case anymore that instruction is available for B

detach_instruction_from_batch.description: detach a payment instruction B from a netting batch A
preconditions: I can only detach a payment instruction B from a netting batch A if it is the case that the payment instruction B is attached to the netting batch A
I can only detach a payment instruction B from a netting batch A if it is not the case that the batch is composed of A and it is not the case that the pre settlement is approved for A
effects: Once I detach a payment instruction B from a netting batch A, it is the case that instruction is available for B

Once I detach a payment instruction B from a netting batch A, it is not the case anymore that the payment instruction B is attached to the netting batch A and it is not the case anymore that the netting batch A has instructions and it is not the case anymore that routing is assigned to the netting batch A and it is not the case anymore that the netting batch A is validated and it is not the case anymore that A has a funding hold flag and it is not the case anymore that A has an execution ready flag and it is not the case anymore that A is bound to an external service

assign_routing_rule_to_batch.description: assign a routing rule B to a netting batch A
preconditions: I can only assign a routing rule B to a netting batch A if it is the case that the batch A is initialized and routing rule is available for B
effects: Once I assign a routing rule B to a netting batch A, it is the case that B is assigned to A
Once I assign a routing rule B to a netting batch A, it is not the case anymore that routing rule is available for B

revoke_routing_rule_from_batch.description: revoke a routing rule B from a netting batch A
preconditions: I can only revoke a routing rule B from a netting batch A if it is the case that B is assigned to A
effects: Once I revoke a routing rule B from a netting batch A, it is the case that routing rule is available for B
Once I revoke a routing rule B from a netting batch A, it is not the case anymore that B is assigned to A

confirm_routing_assignment.description: confirm routing assignment of a routing rule B to a netting batch A
preconditions: I can only confirm routing assignment of a routing rule B to a netting batch A if it is the case that the batch A is initialized and the netting batch A has instructions and B is assigned to A
I can only confirm routing assignment of a routing rule B to a netting batch A if it is not the case that routing is assigned to the netting batch A
effects: Once I confirm routing assignment of a routing rule B to a netting batch A, it is the case that routing is assigned to the netting batch A

apply_approval_token.description: apply an approval token B to a netting batch A
preconditions: I can only apply an approval token B to a netting batch A if it is the case that the batch A is initialized and the netting batch A has instructions and approval token is available for B
I can only apply an approval token B to a netting batch A if it is not the case that routing is assigned to the netting batch A
effects: Once I apply an approval token B to a netting batch A, it is the case that routing is assigned to the netting batch A and A has a funding hold flag
Once I apply an approval token B to a netting batch A, it is not the case anymore that approval token is available for B

apply_clearing_agent_validation.description: apply clearing agent validation using a routing rule B and a clearing agent C to a netting batch A
preconditions: I can only apply clearing agent validation using a routing rule B and a clearing agent C to a netting batch A if it is the case that routing is assigned to the netting batch A and the netting batch A has instructions and B is assigned to A and clearing agent is available for C
I can only apply clearing agent validation using a routing rule B and a clearing agent C to a netting batch A if it is not the case that the netting batch A is validated
effects: Once I apply clearing agent validation using a routing rule B and a clearing agent C to a netting batch A, it is the case that the netting batch A is validated
Once I apply clearing agent validation using a routing rule B and a clearing agent C to a netting batch A, it is not the case anymore that A has a funding hold flag

release_via_execution_window.description: release a netting batch A via an execution window B
preconditions: I can only release a netting batch A via an execution window B if it is the case that the netting batch A has instructions and A is a secondary window confirmed for B
I can only release a netting batch A via an execution window B if it is not the case that the netting batch A is validated
effects: Once I release a netting batch A via an execution window B, it is the case that the netting batch A is validated
Once I release a netting batch A via an execution window B, it is not the case anymore that A has a funding hold flag

bind_sending_account_to_batch.description: bind a sending account B to a netting batch A
preconditions: I can only bind a sending account B to a netting batch A if it is the case that the batch A is initialized and sending account is available for B and A is eligible for sending account B
effects: Once I bind a sending account B to a netting batch A, it is the case that the netting batch A is assigned to the sending account B
Once I bind a sending account B to a netting batch A, it is not the case anymore that sending account is available for B

unbind_sending_account_from_batch.description: unbind a sending account B from a netting batch A
preconditions: I can only unbind a sending account B from a netting batch A if it is the case that the netting batch A is assigned to the sending account B
effects: Once I unbind a sending account B from a netting batch A, it is the case that sending account is available for B
Once I unbind a sending account B from a netting batch A, it is not the case anymore that the netting batch A is assigned to the sending account B

bind_receiving_account_to_batch.description: bind a receiving account B to a netting batch A
preconditions: I can only bind a receiving account B to a netting batch A if it is the case that the batch A is initialized and receiving account is available for B and A is eligible for receiving account B
effects: Once I bind a receiving account B to a netting batch A, it is the case that the netting batch A is assigned to the receiving account B
Once I bind a receiving account B to a netting batch A, it is not the case anymore that receiving account is available for B

unbind_receiving_account_from_batch.description: unbind a receiving account B from a netting batch A
preconditions: I can only unbind a receiving account B from a netting batch A if it is the case that the netting batch A is assigned to the receiving account B
effects: Once I unbind a receiving account B from a netting batch A, it is the case that receiving account is available for B
Once I unbind a receiving account B from a netting batch A, it is not the case anymore that the netting batch A is assigned to the receiving account B

bind_funding_account_to_batch.description: bind a funding account B to a netting batch A
preconditions: I can only bind a funding account B to a netting batch A if it is the case that the batch A is initialized and funding account is available for B and A is eligible for funding account B
effects: Once I bind a funding account B to a netting batch A, it is the case that the netting batch A is assigned to the funding account B
Once I bind a funding account B to a netting batch A, it is not the case anymore that funding account is available for B

unbind_funding_account_from_batch.description: unbind a funding account B from a netting batch A
preconditions: I can only unbind a funding account B from a netting batch A if it is the case that the netting batch A is assigned to the funding account B
effects: Once I unbind a funding account B from a netting batch A, it is the case that funding account is available for B
Once I unbind a funding account B from a netting batch A, it is not the case anymore that the netting batch A is assigned to the funding account B

bind_instrument_to_batch.description: bind an instrument B to a netting batch A
preconditions: I can only bind an instrument B to a netting batch A if it is the case that the batch A is initialized and B is available and A is eligible for instrument B
effects: Once I bind an instrument B to a netting batch A, it is the case that the netting batch A is assigned to the instrument B
Once I bind an instrument B to a netting batch A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

unbind_instrument_from_batch.description: unbind an instrument B from a netting batch A
preconditions: I can only unbind an instrument B from a netting batch A if it is the case that the netting batch A is assigned to the instrument B
effects: Once I unbind an instrument B from a netting batch A, it is the case that B is available
Once I unbind an instrument B from a netting batch A, it is not the case anymore that the netting batch A is assigned to the instrument B

compose_settlement_for_rail.description: compose settlement for a netting batch A on a settlement rail B from a sending account C to a receiving account D
preconditions: I can only compose settlement for a netting batch A on a settlement rail B from a sending account C to a receiving account D if it is the case that the netting batch A has instructions and the netting batch A is assigned to the sending account C and the netting batch A is assigned to the receiving account D and rail is available for B and A is compatible with settlement rail B
I can only compose settlement for a netting batch A on a settlement rail B from a sending account C to a receiving account D if it is not the case that the batch is composed of A
effects: Once I compose settlement for a netting batch A on a settlement rail B from a sending account C to a receiving account D, it is the case that the netting batch A is composed of settlement on rail B and the batch is composed of A
Once I compose settlement for a netting batch A on a settlement rail B from a sending account C to a receiving account D, it is not the case anymore that rail is available for B

compose_settlement_with_external_service.description: compose settlement for a netting batch A with an external settlement service D using a settlement rail B from a funding account C
preconditions: I can only compose settlement for a netting batch A with an external settlement service D using a settlement rail B from a funding account C if it is the case that the netting batch A has instructions and the netting batch A is assigned to the funding account C and external service is available for D and rail is available for B and A is compatible with settlement rail B and A is eligible for external settlement service D
I can only compose settlement for a netting batch A with an external settlement service D using a settlement rail B from a funding account C if it is not the case that the batch is composed of A
effects: Once I compose settlement for a netting batch A with an external settlement service D using a settlement rail B from a funding account C, it is the case that the netting batch A is composed of settlement on rail B and the batch is composed of A and A is bound to an external service and A has a funding hold flag

Once I compose settlement for a netting batch A with an external settlement service D using a settlement rail B from a funding account C, it is not the case anymore that rail is available for B and it is not the case anymore that external service is available for D

clear_pre_settlement_checks.description: clear pre settlement checks for a netting batch A between a sending account B and a receiving account C
preconditions: I can only clear pre settlement checks for a netting batch A between a sending account B and a receiving account C if it is the case that the batch is composed of A and A is bound to an external service and the netting batch A is assigned to the sending account B and the netting batch A is assigned to the receiving account C
effects: Once I clear pre settlement checks for a netting batch A between a sending account B and a receiving account C, it is not the case anymore that A is bound to an external service and it is not the case anymore that A has a funding hold flag

set_pre_settlement_approval.description: set pre settlement approval for a netting batch A between a sending account B and a receiving account C in a priority group a priority group a D
preconditions: I can only set pre settlement approval for a netting batch A between a sending account B and a receiving account C in a priority group a priority group a D if it is the case that the netting batch A is validated and the batch is composed of A and the netting batch A is assigned to the sending account B and the netting batch A is assigned to the receiving account C and A belongs to priority group D

I can only set pre settlement approval for a netting batch A between a sending account B and a receiving account C in a priority group a priority group a D if it is not the case that A has a funding hold flag and it is not the case that the pre settlement is approved for A
effects: Once I set pre settlement approval for a netting batch A between a sending account B and a receiving account C in a priority group a priority group a D, it is the case that the pre settlement is approved for A

set_pre_settlement_approval_with_priorit.description: set pre settlement approval with priority for a netting batch A using a funding account B and an instrument C in a priority group b D
preconditions: I can only set pre settlement approval with priority for a netting batch A using a funding account B and an instrument C in a priority group b D if it is the case that the netting batch A is validated and the batch is composed of A and the netting batch A is assigned to the funding account B and the netting batch A is assigned to the instrument C and A belongs to priority group D

I can only set pre settlement approval with priority for a netting batch A using a funding account B and an instrument C in a priority group b D if it is not the case that the pre settlement is approved for A
effects: Once I set pre settlement approval with priority for a netting batch A using a funding account B and an instrument C in a priority group b D, it is the case that the pre settlement is approved for A and A has a funding hold flag

progress_to_execution_ready.description: progress a netting batch A to execution ready using a sending account B and a receiving account C
preconditions: I can only progress a netting batch A to execution ready using a sending account B and a receiving account C if it is the case that the pre settlement is approved for A and A has a funding hold flag and the netting batch A is assigned to the sending account B and the netting batch A is assigned to the receiving account C
effects: Once I progress a netting batch A to execution ready using a sending account B and a receiving account C, it is the case that A has an execution ready flag

Once I progress a netting batch A to execution ready using a sending account B and a receiving account C, it is not the case anymore that A has a funding hold flag and it is not the case anymore that the netting batch A is validated and it is not the case anymore that A is bound to an external service

reapply_clearing_agent_validation_post_a.description: reapply clearing agent validation post approval for a netting batch A using a routing rule B and a clearing agent C
preconditions: I can only reapply clearing agent validation post approval for a netting batch A using a routing rule B and a clearing agent C if it is the case that A has an execution ready flag and the pre settlement is approved for A and the netting batch A has instructions and B is assigned to A and clearing agent is available for C
I can only reapply clearing agent validation post approval for a netting batch A using a routing rule B and a clearing agent C if it is not the case that the netting batch A is validated
effects: Once I reapply clearing agent validation post approval for a netting batch A using a routing rule B and a clearing agent C, it is the case that the netting batch A is validated

mark_operator_assigned.description: mark operator assigned for a netting batch A with a routing rule B
preconditions: I can only mark operator assigned for a netting batch A with a routing rule B if it is the case that the pre settlement is approved for A and the netting batch A is validated and B is assigned to A
I can only mark operator assigned for a netting batch A with a routing rule B if it is not the case that A has a funding hold flag and it is not the case that an operator is assigned to A
effects: Once I mark operator assigned for a netting batch A with a routing rule B, it is the case that an operator is assigned to A

consume_approval_token_and_mark_operator.description: consume an approval token B and mark operator for a netting batch A
preconditions: I can only consume an approval token B and mark operator for a netting batch A if it is the case that the pre settlement is approved for A and the netting batch A is validated and approval token is available for B
I can only consume an approval token B and mark operator for a netting batch A if it is not the case that A has a funding hold flag and it is not the case that an operator is assigned to A
effects: Once I consume an approval token B and mark operator for a netting batch A, it is the case that an operator is assigned to A
Once I consume an approval token B and mark operator for a netting batch A, it is not the case anymore that approval token is available for B

schedule_primary_batch_window_assignment.description: schedule primary batch window assignment for a netting batch A to an execution window B
preconditions: I can only schedule primary batch window assignment for a netting batch A to an execution window B if it is the case that an operator is assigned to A and window slot is available for B and A is compatible with B
effects: Once I schedule primary batch window assignment for a netting batch A to an execution window B, it is the case that A is assigned to the primary window B
Once I schedule primary batch window assignment for a netting batch A to an execution window B, it is not the case anymore that window slot is available for B

confirm_secondary_batch_window_assignmen.description: confirm secondary batch window assignment for a netting batch secondary A to an execution window C with primary batch a netting batch primary B
preconditions: I can only confirm secondary batch window assignment for a netting batch secondary A to an execution window C with primary batch a netting batch primary B if it is the case that the batch A is initialized and A is a secondary batch and A is a secondary window candidate for C and B is assigned to the primary window C

I can only confirm secondary batch window assignment for a netting batch secondary A to an execution window C with primary batch a netting batch primary B if it is not the case that A is a secondary window confirmed for C
effects: Once I confirm secondary batch window assignment for a netting batch secondary A to an execution window C with primary batch a netting batch primary B, it is the case that A is a secondary window confirmed for C

notify_operator_for_routing.description: notify operator for routing of a netting batch A using a routing rule B with a clearing agent C
preconditions: I can only notify operator for routing of a netting batch A using a routing rule B with a clearing agent C if it is the case that the batch A is initialized and A is a secondary batch and the netting batch A is validated and an operator is assigned to A and B is assigned to A and clearing agent is available for C
I can only notify operator for routing of a netting batch A using a routing rule B with a clearing agent C if it is not the case that operator notification has been sent for A
effects: Once I notify operator for routing of a netting batch A using a routing rule B with a clearing agent C, it is the case that operator notification has been sent for A

finalize_and_release_batch.description: finalize and release a netting batch A
preconditions: I can only finalize and release a netting batch A if it is the case that A is a primary batch and the batch A is initialized and the netting batch A has instructions and the batch is composed of A and the pre settlement is approved for A and an operator is assigned to A and the netting batch A is validated
I can only finalize and release a netting batch A if it is not the case that A is released
effects: Once I finalize and release a netting batch A, it is the case that A is released

finalize_and_release_batch_with_executio.description: finalize and release batch with execution window a netting batch A an execution window B
preconditions: I can only finalize and release batch with execution window a netting batch A an execution window B if it is the case that A is a secondary batch and the batch A is initialized and the netting batch A has instructions and the batch is composed of A and the pre settlement is approved for A and an operator is assigned to A and the netting batch A is validated and A is a secondary window confirmed for B
I can only finalize and release batch with execution window a netting batch A an execution window B if it is not the case that A is released
effects: Once I finalize and release batch with execution window a netting batch A an execution window B, it is the case that A is released

finalize_and_release_batch_after_operato.description: finalize and release a netting batch A after operator notification
preconditions: I can only finalize and release a netting batch A after operator notification if it is the case that A is a secondary batch and the batch A is initialized and the netting batch A has instructions and the batch is composed of A and the pre settlement is approved for A and an operator is assigned to A and the netting batch A is validated and operator notification has been sent for A
I can only finalize and release a netting batch A after operator notification if it is not the case that A is released
effects: Once I finalize and release a netting batch A after operator notification, it is the case that A is released

action_nl_templates.attach_instruction_to_batch: attach payment instruction {?payment_instruction} to netting batch {?netting_batch}
action_nl_templates.detach_instruction_from_batch: detach payment instruction {?payment_instruction} from netting batch {?netting_batch}
action_nl_templates.assign_routing_rule_to_batch: assign routing rule {?routing_rule} to netting batch {?netting_batch}
action_nl_templates.revoke_routing_rule_from_batch: revoke routing rule {?routing_rule} from netting batch {?netting_batch}
action_nl_templates.confirm_routing_assignment: confirm routing assignment of routing rule {?routing_rule} to netting batch {?netting_batch}
action_nl_templates.apply_approval_token: apply approval token {?approval_token} to netting batch {?netting_batch}
action_nl_templates.apply_clearing_agent_validation: apply clearing agent validation using routing rule {?routing_rule} and clearing agent {?clearing_agent} to netting batch {?netting_batch}
action_nl_templates.release_via_execution_window: release netting batch {?netting_batch} via execution window {?execution_window}
action_nl_templates.bind_sending_account_to_batch: bind sending account {?sending_account} to netting batch {?netting_batch}
action_nl_templates.unbind_sending_account_from_batch: unbind sending account {?sending_account} from netting batch {?netting_batch}
action_nl_templates.bind_receiving_account_to_batch: bind receiving account {?receiving_account} to netting batch {?netting_batch}
action_nl_templates.unbind_receiving_account_from_batch: unbind receiving account {?receiving_account} from netting batch {?netting_batch}
action_nl_templates.bind_funding_account_to_batch: bind funding account {?funding_account} to netting batch {?netting_batch}
action_nl_templates.unbind_funding_account_from_batch: unbind funding account {?funding_account} from netting batch {?netting_batch}
action_nl_templates.compose_settlement_for_rail: compose settlement for netting batch {?netting_batch} on settlement rail {?settlement_rail} from sending account {?sending_account} to receiving account {?receiving_account}
action_nl_templates.compose_settlement_with_external_service: compose settlement for netting batch {?netting_batch} with external settlement service {?external_settlement_service} using settlement rail {?settlement_rail} from funding account {?funding_account}
action_nl_templates.clear_pre_settlement_checks: clear pre-settlement checks for netting batch {?netting_batch} between sending account {?sending_account} and receiving account {?receiving_account}
action_nl_templates.set_pre_settlement_approval: set pre-settlement approval for netting batch {?netting_batch} between sending account {?sending_account} and receiving account {?receiving_account} in priority group a {?priority_group_a}
action_nl_templates.set_pre_settlement_approval_with_priorit: set pre-settlement approval with priority for netting batch {?netting_batch} using funding account {?funding_account} and instrument {?instrument} in priority group b {?priority_group_b}
action_nl_templates.progress_to_execution_ready: progress netting batch {?netting_batch} to execution ready using sending account {?sending_account} and receiving account {?receiving_account}
action_nl_templates.reapply_clearing_agent_validation_post_a: reapply clearing agent validation post approval for netting batch {?netting_batch} using routing rule {?routing_rule} and clearing agent {?clearing_agent}
action_nl_templates.mark_operator_assigned: mark operator assigned for netting batch {?netting_batch} with routing rule {?routing_rule}
action_nl_templates.consume_approval_token_and_mark_operator: consume approval token {?approval_token} and mark operator for netting batch {?netting_batch}
action_nl_templates.schedule_primary_batch_window_assignment: schedule primary batch window assignment for netting batch {?netting_batch} to execution window {?execution_window}
action_nl_templates.confirm_secondary_batch_window_assignmen: confirm secondary batch window assignment for netting batch secondary {?netting_batch_secondary} to execution window {?execution_window} with primary batch netting batch primary {?netting_batch_primary}
action_nl_templates.notify_operator_for_routing: notify operator for routing of netting batch {?netting_batch} using routing rule {?routing_rule} with clearing agent {?clearing_agent}
action_nl_templates.finalize_and_release_batch_with_executio: finalize and release batch with execution window {?netting_batch} {?execution_window}
action_nl_templates.finalize_and_release_batch_after_operato: finalize and release netting batch {?netting_batch} after operator notification

predicate_nl_templates.instruction_attached: the payment instruction {?payment_instruction} is attached to the netting batch {?netting_batch}
predicate_nl_templates.routing_assigned: routing is assigned to the netting batch {?netting_batch}
predicate_nl_templates.assigned_sending_account: the netting batch {?netting_batch} is assigned to the sending account {?sending_account}
predicate_nl_templates.assigned_receiving_account: the netting batch {?netting_batch} is assigned to the receiving account {?receiving_account}
predicate_nl_templates.assigned_funding_account: the netting batch {?netting_batch} is assigned to the funding account {?funding_account}
predicate_nl_templates.assigned_instrument: the netting batch {?netting_batch} is assigned to the instrument {?instrument}
predicate_nl_templates.composed_settlement_on_rail: the netting batch {?netting_batch} is composed of settlement on rail {?settlement_rail}
predicate_nl_templates.secondary_window_candidate: {?netting_batch} is a secondary window candidate for {?execution_window}
predicate_nl_templates.secondary_window_confirmed: {?netting_batch} is a secondary window confirmed for {?execution_window}
predicate_nl_templates.operator_notification_sent: operator notification has been sent for {?netting_batch}
predicate_nl_templates.batch_external_service_eligible: {?netting_batch} is eligible for external settlement service {?external_settlement_service}
predicate_nl_templates.primary_window_assigned: {?netting_batch} is assigned to the primary window {?execution_window}
predicate_nl_templates.external_service_bound: {?netting_batch} is bound to an external service

type_hierarchy: Everything that is a netting batch or a payment instruction or a settlement rail or a receiving account or a sending account or a funding account or a routing rule or a approval token or a execution window or a clearing agent or a external settlement service or a instrument or a priority group is also a object
Everything that is a priority group a or a priority group b is also a priority group
Everything that is a netting batch primary or a netting batch secondary is also a netting batch
